**What would you like to see?**

**What problem does this solve for you?**

**Which part of the app is this for?**
<!-- e.g. Music Generation, Voice, Karaoke, Mixer, Play, general UI -->

**Any examples from other tools that do something similar?**

**How important is this to your workflow?**
- [ ] Blocker — I can't use the app properly without this
- [ ] Important — I'd use it constantly
- [ ] Nice to have — would improve my experience
